inputs.titre: Destruction de la ville de Valtari

reason: The image depicts a city in ruins, with people fleeing. Clothing appears to be tunics and cloaks, fitting the early medieval period. Architecture appears consistent with the period. The absence of anachronisms, fantastical elements, or obvious modern structures supports this assessment. The atmosphere effectively conveys chaos and destruction. However the image looks like it was AI generated, hence the lower score.
